# Slowed Enhanced

[![Chrome Web Store](https://img.shields.io/badge/Chrome%20Web%20Store-v1.9.2-blue?logo=googlechrome)](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/mbknnccopgggeedhnloodppflepboggp?utm_source=item-share-cb)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-lightgrey)](https://github.com/shaafyousaf/Slowed-Enhanced/blob/master/LICENSE.txt)

The only free, open-source Chrome extension that slows down browser audio in real-time with pitch preservation. Built on the Web Audio API using granular time-stretching — speech stays clear and natural at any speed, unlike the robotic output of native `HTMLMediaElement.playbackRate` resampling. Works on any browser media.

722 installs and 67 active users across 3 continents since launch, with zero marketing. Built and maintained solo.

**Looking for contributors.** Vanilla JS + Web Audio API, no build step. Clone, load unpacked, and you're running in under a minute.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/shaafyousaf/Slowed-Enhanced.git
# chrome://extensions/ → Enable Developer Mode → Load Unpacked
```

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<!DOCTYPE svg PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD SVG 1.1//EN" "http://www.w3.org/Graphics/SVG/1.1/DTD/svg11.dtd">
<svg width="1899px" height="808px" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xml:space="preserve" xmlns:serif="http://www.serif.com/" style="fill-rule:evenodd;clip-rule:evenodd;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-miterlimit:2;">
    <g transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,-7414.93,-12411.4)">
        <g id="Artboard1" transform="matrix(15.0391,0,0,6.31222,7414.93,12411.4)">
            <rect x="0" y="0" width="126.226" height="128" style="fill:white;"/>
            <clipPath id="_clip1">
                <rect x="0" y="0" width="126.226" height="128"/>
            </clipPath>
            <g clip-path="url(#_clip1)">
                <g>
                    <g transform="matrix(0.0664932,-0,-0,0.158423,0,0)">
                        <use xlink:href="#_Image2" x="384.828" y="0" width="1130px" height="808px"/>
                    </g>
                    <g transform="matrix(0.0766358,0,0,0.182588,-921.76,-735.453)">
                        <path d="M13269,4089.62L13269,4667.28C13269,4673.27 13264.1,4678.14 13258.1,4678.14L12444.6,4678.14C12438.6,4678.14 12433.7,4673.27 12433.7,4667.28L12433.7,4089.62C12433.7,4083.62 12438.6,4078.76 12444.6,4078.76L13258.1,4078.76C13264.1,4078.76 13269,4083.62 13269,4089.62Z" style="fill:none;"/>
                        <clipPath id="_clip3">
                            <path d="M13269,4089.62L13269,4667.28C13269,4673.27 13264.1,4678.14 13258.1,4678.14L12444.6,4678.14C12438.6,4678.14 12433.7,4673.27 12433.7,4667.28L12433.7,4089.62C12433.7,4083.62 12438.6,4078.76 12444.6,4078.76L13258.1,4078.76C13264.1,4078.76 13269,4083.62 13269,4089.62Z"/>
                        </clipPath>
                        <g clip-path="url(#_clip3)">
                            <g>
                                <g transform="matrix(0.867652,-0,-0,0.867652,12027.8,4027.93)">
                                    <use xlink:href="#_Image4" x="467.828" y="58.578" width="963px" height="691px"/>
                                </g>
                                <g transform="matrix(1.75141,0,0,1.75141,12423.1,4062.78)">
                                    <clipPath id="_clip5">
                                        <rect x="6.066" y="9.124" width="476.907" height="342.228"/>
                                    </clipPath>
                                    <g clip-path="url(#_clip5)">
                                        <clipPath id="_clip6">
                                            <rect x="6.066" y="9.124" width="476.907" height="342.228"/>
                                        </clipPath>
                                        <g clip-path="url(#_clip6)">
                                            <g transform="matrix(0.495402,-0,-0,0.495402,-225.697,-19.8954)">
                                                <use xlink:href="#_Image7" x="467.828" y="58.578" width="963px" height="691px"/>
                                            </g>
                                        </g>
                                    </g>
                                </g>
                            </g>
                        </g>
                    </g>
                </g>
            </g>
        </g>
    </g>
    <defs>
        <image id="_Image2" width="1130px" height="808px" xlink:href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
        <image id="_Image4" width="963px" height="691px" xlink:href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
        <image id="_Image7" width="963px" height="691px" xlink:href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
    </defs>
</svg><img width="1900" height="809" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/63369a53-f80c-435e-8de1-f9618b85d75e" />
